mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_analysis (application_case_id, employment_type, experience_level, required_skills, preferred_skills, duties, qualifications, difficulty, summary) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{requiredSkills}, #{preferredSkills}, #{duties}, #{qualifications}, #{difficulty}, #{summary})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
